mapper.select: select * from payment where order_id = #{orderId} and payment_id = #{paymentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET status = 'PAY_PROCESSING', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status IN ('PAY_INIT','PAY_FAIL')
UPDATE payment SET status = 'PAY_SUCCESS', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PAY_PROCESSING'
UPDATE payment SET status = 'PAY_FAIL', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'PAY_PROCESSING'
UPDATE payment SET status = 'REFUND_INIT', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND payment_id = #{paymentId} AND status IN ('PAY_SUCCESS','REFUND_FAIL')
UPDATE payment SET status = 'REFUND_PROCESSING', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND payment_id = #{paymentId} AND status in ('PAY_SUCCESS', 'REFUND_FAIL')
UPDATE payment SET status = 'REFUND_SUCCESS', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND payment_id = #{paymentId} AND status = 'REFUND_PROCESSING'
UPDATE payment SET status = 'REFUND_FAIL', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND payment_id = #{paymentId} AND status = 'REFUND_PROCESSING'
